topStories.title: ‘Arrested without any evidence’: Political leaders welcome climate activist Sonam Wangchuk’s release
topStories.description: Sonam Wangchuk  was released from prison on Saturday, days before the Supreme Court's hearing of the plea filed by his wife challenging his detention.

topStories.title: US bounty on Mojtaba Khamenei? Washington offers $10 million for intel on Iran's new Supreme Leader, IRGC chiefs
topStories.description: US State Department has placed a $10 million (over  ₹83 crore) bounty on Iran's new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei and senior IRGC officials under its Rewards for Justice programme, in Washington's boldest intelligence push against Tehran yet.

topStories.title: Congress releases second list of 23 candidates for Assam elections, leaves 15 seats for allies
topStories.description: Congress is leading an alliance of opposition parties, including CPI(M) and Assam Jatiya Parishad, with the CPI (ML) Liberation also lending its support.

topStories.title: Iran US News LIVE Updates: Trump urges friendly nations to help secure Strait of Hormuz as war enters third week
topStories.description: Iran US News LIVE Updates: Iran urged civilians in the United Arab Emirates to leave areas around ports, docks, and what it called ‘American hideouts,’ claiming that United States forces had launched attacks on Iran from those locations.

topStories.title: Will Trump help or hinder Zimbabwe's white farmers in their compensation battle?
topStories.description: They have engaged a lobbying firm with close ties to the US president to argue their case.

topStories.title: Iran war live: Trump urges allies to keep Hormuz open amid Gulf attacks
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump says allies who rely on Gulf oil must help keep the Strait of Hormuz open.

topStories.title: Iraq taking private plane to Mexico for World Cup play-off
topStories.description: Iraq will travel to Mexico by private plane for their World Cup play-off despite calls from coach Graham Arnold to postpone the match amid the escalating US-Israeli war with Iran, the country's FA president Adnan Dirjal says.

topStories.title: Pakistan strikes Afghan base after its president warns ‘red line’ crossed
topStories.description: Islamabad hits Kandahar facility after Taliban drones strike civilian areas and military sites as conflict intensifies.

topStories.title: Brazil’s jailed ex-president Bolsonaro hospitalised with lung infection
topStories.description: Far-right leader, whose persistent health woes are linked to 2018 stabbing, endorsed son to run in this year's election.

topStories.title: Cuban protesters ransack Communist office as energy crisis deepens
topStories.description: Discontent is mounting over rolling blackouts and shortages of food, fuel and medicine, exacerbated by a US blockade.

dailyNews.title: Iran-Israel war: Benjamin Netanyahu's son goes ‘missing’; Yair’s unusual silence on social media sparks speculation
dailyNews.description: Yair Netanyahu's absence from social media has sparked speculation amid rising tensions between Israel and Iran. A US insider raised security concerns.

dailyNews.title: Cong releases second list of 23 candidates for Assam polls
dailyNews.description: Congress general secretary (organisation) K.C. Venugopal released the second list of candidates for the 126-member Assembly; the party also left 15 seats for its alliance partners

dailyNews.title: US-Israeli strike kills 15 at Isfahan factory, Iranian media says
dailyNews.description: Iranian media report the deaths in central Iran as Tehran launches new missile salvoes at Israeli targets.

dailyNews.title: Thousands in Madrid protest ‘forgotten’ Gaza, warn Iran war may spiral into
dailyNews.description: Thousands rallied in central Madrid calling for an end to the war involving the United States, Israel and Iran.

dailyNews.title: US Army announces contract with Anduril worth up to $20B
dailyNews.description: The Army described this as a single enterprise contract consolidating more than 120 separate "procurement actions."

dailyNews.title: Hundreds protest against US-Israeli strikes on Iran in Seoul
dailyNews.description: Hundreds of peace activists and demonstrators marched in central Seoul on Saturday in protest of the US-Israeli strikes.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration to drop charges against US veteran who burned flag
dailyNews.description: Veteran Jay Carey burned a US flag in protest of an executive order from Trump calling for prison terms for such acts.

dailyNews.title: Turkey on alert as Iran conflict escalates, warns against provocations
dailyNews.description: Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan says Ankara is monitoring the regional war involving Iran, the US, and Israel.

dailyNews.title: Six killed in attacks on Ukraine as EU extends sanctions against Russians
dailyNews.description: EU maintains pressure after slamming US for lifting sanctions on Russian oil exports as Middle East war bites.

dailyNews.title: Iran Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi rejects US’ claims about Iran new supreme leader’s health
dailyNews.description: The remarks come after Pete Hegseth said on Friday (March 13) that Iran’s new Supreme Leader was “wounded and likely disfigured.”

dailyNews.title: Trump administration threatens news outlets over critical coverage of Iran
dailyNews.description: FCC chair says news outlets that share 'distortions' about US war with Iran could lose their licences.

dailyNews.title: Did Trump shut down Middle East allies' push for Iran ceasefire talks? What report says
dailyNews.description: Earlier, Trump claimed on Truth Social, that Iran’s leadership and military had been so weakened by US–Israeli strikes that they wanted to negotiate but that it was ‘Too Late!’

dailyNews.title: US embassy in Venezuela reopens as Trump pushes for access to resources
dailyNews.description: Trump administration has pressed the interim Venezuelan government for concessions on issues such as oil access.

dailyNews.title: Trump says ‘many countries’ will send warships to Hormuz amid Iran blockade
dailyNews.description: US president urges naval coalition as Iran says Strait of Hormuz closed to 'tankers and ships of enemies' during war.

dailyNews.title: American flag raised, flies over US Embassy building in Venezuela for first time in 7 years
dailyNews.description: The U.S. Embassy in Caracas raised the American flag for the first time in seven years, months after former President Nicolás Maduro's capture by U.S. forces.

dailyNews.title: Son of British couple detained in Iran 'let down' by Starmer's leadership on parent's imprisonment amid war
dailyNews.description: The son of British prisoners in Iran slammed U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer's "non-existent" advocacy and urged President Donald Trump to remember prisoners during strikes on Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump-backed Potomac sewage cleanup complete after massive spill ahead of summer America250 celebrations
dailyNews.description: Potomac River sewage spill repairs have been completed after President Donald Trump approved a federal disaster declaration allowing FEMA assistance.

dailyNews.title: For Trump, a Promised Economic Boom Collides With the Costs of War
dailyNews.description: President Trump had envisioned a growing economy and improving fortunes for American families in 2026. That appears at risk in his war with Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump Pardons: Lobbyist Charged in Extortion Attempt
dailyNews.description: Josh Nass had recently represented Joseph Schwartz, a former nursing home executive who was convicted of tax crimes before being freed by the president late last year.

dailyNews.title: How Trump Officials Embraced an Animal Rights Campaign
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration is curbing animal experiments in response to shifts in public opinion, technological advances, years of animal rights advocacy and the work of a conservative activist.

dailyNews.title: What Trump Didn’t Know About Iran
dailyNews.description: Ali Vaez, the Iran project director at the International Crisis Group, explains the history of miscalculations that led to the war in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump thanks TSA agents working with no pay amid government shutdown
dailyNews.description: TSA officers faced their first full missed paycheck Friday.

dailyNews.title: Tehran threatens to retaliate after U.S. attacks vital Iranian oil hub
dailyNews.description: President Trump alleged that Iran is "totally defeated and wants a deal," but not one he "would accept."

dailyNews.title: FCC Chair Brendan Carr says broadcast licenses are not a "property right"
dailyNews.description: In an exclusive interview with CBS News Saturday, Federal Communications Chair Brendan Carr doubled down on his warning that broadcast licenses could be revoked amid President Trump's criticisms of media coverage of the war in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump asks China, France, others to help keep Strait of Hormuz open amid war in Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump called on countries like the U.K., France, South Korea, Japan and even China to help keep the Strait of Hormuz open as Iran tries to strangle the flow of oil from the region. Charlie D'Agata reports.
